nasb.text: Will not your creditors rise up suddenly, And those who collect from you awaken? Indeed, you will become plunder for them.

esv.text: Will not your debtors suddenly arise, and those awake who will make you tremble? Then you will be spoil for them.

cnv.text: 你的債主豈不忽然起來？ 擾亂你的豈不醒起？ 你就成了他們的擄物。

ccb.text: 向你们借债的人必突然攻击你们， 使你们战战兢兢， 成为俘虏。
